articles.title: World Cup: 4-1 to Norway, France goes first in the group
articles.summary: (ANSA) - BOSTON, JUNE 26 - France beat Norway 4-1 (3-1) and finished Group I of the Football World Cup in the lead with full points. The absolute protagonist was Ousmane Dembel, who scored a hat-trick in the first half (7', 20' and 32').
